hero.title: GoPick Assessment Center
hero.subtitle: A browser-based platform for building, scheduling, delivering and reporting on online assessments.

about: GoPick is a browser-based, multi-tenant assessment platform that supports the full lifecycle of online testing: building item banks, creating assessments, scheduling candidates, running secure test sessions, and producing detailed reports.
contact:
Admin / Manager portal: http://localhost:82/app/administrator/
Candidate portal: http://localhost:82/app/
If you cannot log in, contact your site administrator.
